metadata.title: Zohal — Document analysis that stands up to review
metadata.description: Turn contracts, invoices, and document sets into verified findings, surfaced conflicts, and decision-ready outputs with exact evidence.

brand.name: Zohal
brand.tagline: Document analysis that stands up to review.

hero.headline: Document analysis that stands up to review.
hero.subhead: Zohal turns contracts, invoices, and multi-file document sets into verified findings and surfaced conflicts. Every important claim stays tied to page-level evidence, so the final output is ready for review and sharing.
hero.proofLine: No credit card • Arabic + English ready • Exact page evidence for every key finding

credibilityStrip.label: Built for document review that has to hold up.

problem.title: Speed matters. So does proof.
body: Teams handling sensitive documents cannot afford black-box summaries, hidden contradictions, or outputs that fall apart under review.
Zohal does more than summarize. It verifies each finding against the source, shows the exact page and passage, and flags conflicts before they become business mistakes.

howItWorks.title: From messy documents to verified outputs in minutes.
howItWorks.subhead: Upload the file, review the findings and conflicts, then export a clean decision pack with evidence attached.

steps.title: Upload Anything
steps.body: Scanned PDFs, photo attachments, spreadsheets, and bilingual document sets all go through the same intake flow.

steps.title: Zohal Finds the Facts
steps.body: Key facts like dates, parties, amounts, obligations, term, and governing law are extracted and linked back to the source text.

steps.title: Review the Conflict Radar
steps.body: Zohal flags contradictions across agreements, amendments, annexes, translations, and supporting documents before anything is sent.

steps.title: Export and Send
steps.body: Download a decision pack in PDF or Word and share it internally or externally after review.

items.label: To reach a first verified review pack

stats.footnote: Final judgment stays with your team. Zohal speeds up review and makes evidence easier to verify.

capabilities.title: Built around how teams review documents.

tabs.label: Verified Facts
tabs.title: Key document facts in plain language.
bullets: Parties, dates, amounts, obligations, and key terms are presented as review-ready fields
Each fact stays tied to the page where it was found
Unclear fields stay marked for review instead of being guessed

tabs.label: Conflict Radar
tabs.title: Contradictions are obvious before they reach the next reviewer.
bullets: Conflicting source documents are surfaced immediately
Cross-language differences are shown as review items, not hidden in summaries
The team reviews exceptions instead of re-reading every page from scratch

tabs.label: Bilingual Review
tabs.title: Arabic and English checked in one place.
bullets: Mixed layouts, stamps, tables, and scans are handled in the same review flow
Arabic and English evidence can be checked side by side
Translation mistakes are surfaced with source-linked proof

tabs.label: Decision Packs
tabs.title: An output you can actually send.
bullets: Verified findings, conflicts, and evidence are packaged into a clean summary
Exports are designed for internal review or direct stakeholder delivery
The output looks like reviewed work product, not raw AI output

tabs.label: Review Controls
tabs.title: Your team stays in control of the final answer.
bullets: Review checkpoints keep important findings from shipping unchecked
History makes it clear what changed and what still needs attention
Access stays limited to the people working on the matter

cards.title: Contract Review
cards.subtitle: Catch renewal terms, liability language, and hidden conflicts before they reach the next reviewer.
bullets: Dates, parties, term, governing law, liability, and termination clauses
Clause-level evidence for each highlighted finding
Clean decision-pack output for review

cards.title: Amendments and Related Files
cards.subtitle: Check what changed without re-reading the full stack manually.
bullets: Primary document versus supporting-file comparison
Conflicting terms surfaced as explicit review items
Clear handoff for final judgment

cards.title: Bilingual Review
cards.subtitle: Review Arabic and English versions together before anything is sent out.
bullets: Side-by-side evidence for both languages
Layout-aware handling for scans, stamps, and annexes
Translation mismatches surfaced early

cards.title: Verification Workflows
cards.subtitle: Get to a documented first pass faster when the business needs an answer now.
bullets: Fast first-pass review with evidence links
Decision packs that are easy to share with stakeholders
Clear record of what was checked and what needs escalation

decisionPack.title: A decision pack you can actually forward.
bullets: Executive summary with verified findings in plain language
Conflict list with exact page references for faster review
Key facts table linked to the source text
Export options built for PDF and Word handoff

security.title: Security built for sensitive document work.
leftBullets: Zero-training policy: customer documents are not used to train models
Each export carries a manifest of what was checked and when
Workspace-based access and review history for controlled collaboration
Clear handling when evidence is missing or contradictory

rightCard.title: Built for confidential work
bullets: Evidence stays linked to the source inside the workspace
Review history makes changes easy to audit
Access can stay limited to the active team
Exports remain structured for internal review or external delivery

professional.name: Pro
bullets: For individual professionals who need more daily throughput
100 documents and 10 workspaces
Unlimited core AI actions
100 semantic searches and 100 asks per day
Calendar sync and core exports

professional.name: Max
bullets: For power users who want the individual top tier
Unlimited documents, workspaces, searches, and asks
Priority support and Google Drive sync
Full bilingual verification workflows
Best fit when you do not need shared team billing

enterprise.name: Team
bullets: Shared workspaces and team collaboration controls
14-day trial with card setup through Moyasar
Trial usage is capped to Pro limits until billing begins
Business-grade verification workflows and audit history
Best fit for the first live team rollout

enterprise.name: Enterprise
bullets: Larger rollouts, governance controls, and procurement support
Data-locality planning and custom onboarding
Shared rollout planning across multiple teams
Custom pricing, support, and deployment scope

usageMeter.title: For first live team rollouts
usageMeter.body: Team includes a 14-day trial with card setup through Moyasar. Trial usage is capped to Pro limits until billing begins, so you can test the workflow before full team billing starts. Enterprise pricing is custom.

insights.title: Where teams use Zohal first.
insights.subhead: Common review jobs where proof matters more than another generic summary.

items.title: Lease reviews with conflicting renewal dates
items.excerpt: Catch date conflicts across the main agreement and later amendments before the memo is sent.

items.title: Arabic/English contract checks before signature
items.excerpt: Compare both language versions and surface translation differences with linked evidence.

items.title: Fast first-pass review for amendment stacks
items.excerpt: Turn a messy bundle into a short, reviewable pack that highlights only what changed.

cta.label: Talk to us about your workflow

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: A few practical questions teams ask before they start.

items.q: How does Zohal keep findings trustworthy?
items.a: Each finding stays tied to the source page and clause. If evidence is weak, missing, or contradictory, Zohal marks it for review instead of presenting it as settled.

items.q: What happens when source documents conflict?
items.a: Zohal flags the contradiction as a review item and points to both locations so your team can resolve it intentionally before exporting the pack.

items.q: Does it support Arabic and English documents together?
items.a: Yes. The review flow is designed for bilingual documents, including mixed layouts, scans, annexes, and stamped pages.

items.q: What do we actually send at the end?
items.a: You export a clean review output with verified facts, surfaced conflicts, and linked evidence, so the work can move from first review to internal sign-off or external sharing without being rebuilt by hand.

items.q: Do you use our client files to train models?
items.a: No. Zohal follows a zero-training policy for client documents.

contactRow.note: Want to see how this would look in your workflow? Contact us and we will tailor a sample review output.

finalCta.title: Turn document chaos into verified work.
finalCta.subhead: Generate decision packs your team can forward with evidence attached.

footer.legalNote: Watd Information Technology Company provides evidence-backed workflow assistance. Your team remains responsible for legal review and final approvals.

ui.mentalModelLine: Upload documents -> verify findings -> ship outputs

modal.demoShowsBody: see how Zohal grounds findings in the source, flags conflicts, and turns the result into a shareable review output.

mock.highlightSnippet: Highlighted clause: governing law and notice terms differ across the document set.
mock.exceptionsQueueBody: Page 4 says "30 days" but Page 12 says "60 days".

decisionPackPreview.deliverablesBody: Ready for internal review or direct client delivery.
